title: The Reports Concerning Abu Dharr (al-Ghifari
description: In this year-that is, the year 30 (650-5 r)-occurred (the events) that have been recorded about the affair of Abu Dharr and Mu'awiyah, and about Mu'awiyah' s exiling him from Syria to Medina. Many things have been recorded as to why he sent him into exile, most of which I am loathe to mention.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 15
